club.joinBody: Once the club owner approves your request you can start booking sessions.

verify.subject: Oarly — Verify your email
verify.heading: Verify your email
verify.body: Please verify your email address to activate your Oarly account. Just click the link below.

reset.subject: Oarly — Reset your password
reset.heading: Reset your password
reset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the link below to set a new one.

auth.verifyBody: We sent you a verification link. Click the link in your email to continue.
auth.forgotBody: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetDone: Your password is updated. You can sign in now.
auth.kvkkConsent: I have read and accept the privacy policy and KVKK clarification text.
auth.kvkkNotice: By continuing you accept the privacy policy and KVKK clarification text.
auth.errorPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errorConsent: You must accept the KVKK text to continue.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy & KVKK
privacy.stub: The full clarification text and privacy policy will be published before launch.
